nasb.text: But I will sacrifice to You With the voice of thanksgiving. That which I have vowed I will pay. Salvation is from the Lord.”

esv.text: But I with the voice of thanksgiving will sacrifice to you; what I have vowed I will pay. Salvation belongs to the Lord!”

cnv.text: 至於我，我要帶著感謝的聲音向你獻祭； 我所許的願，我必償還。 救恩是屬於耶和華的。”

ccb.text: 但我要用感谢的声音向你献祭， 我必还我许的愿， 因为救恩来自耶和华。”

csbs.text: 而我却要以感谢的声音向你献祭； 我所许的愿，我必偿还。 救恩在于耶和华！”
